description: 10 diverse hardware configurations for validating VLA model performance modeling

model.name: openvla-7b
model.description: OpenVLA (Vision-Language-Action) model based on Llama-2-7b backbone with ViT vision encoder

experiments.name: H100 Single Device Baseline
experiments.description: Single H100 device baseline - no parallelism, validates basic model performance

experiments.name: H100 2-Way Tensor Parallelism
experiments.description: 2 H100 devices with tensor parallelism - validates TP communication overhead

validation_metrics.notes: TP=2 should reduce latency vs single device, but adds AllReduce overhead

experiments.name: H100 4-Way Tensor Parallelism
experiments.description: 4 H100 devices with tensor parallelism - tests higher TP scaling

validation_metrics.notes: TP=4 further reduces per-device memory but increases communication

experiments.name: H100 2-Stage Pipeline Parallelism
experiments.description: 8 H100 devices with 2-stage PP, TP=4 per stage - validates PP with P2P communication

validation_metrics.notes: PP splits model across stages, P2P communication between stages

experiments.name: H100 4-Stage Pipeline Parallelism
experiments.description: 8 H100 devices with 4-stage PP, TP=2 per stage - tests fine-grained PP

validation_metrics.notes: More PP stages = more P2P communication but better memory distribution

experiments.name: A100 4-Device Mixed Parallelism
experiments.description: 4 A100 devices with PP+TP - validates different hardware (A100 vs H100)

hardware_config.note: Using template.json as A100 config (modify frequency_Hz to 1410e6 for A100)

validation_metrics.notes: A100 has lower compute than H100, should show higher latency

experiments.name: H100 Pipeline + Data Parallelism
experiments.description: 8 H100 devices with PP+TP+DP - validates data parallelism with pipeline

validation_metrics.notes: DP=2 means 2 replicas per stage, improves throughput for batch processing

experiments.name: H100 Asymmetric Pipeline Stages
experiments.description: 8 H100 devices with asymmetric PP stages - validates uneven layer distribution

validation_metrics.expected_stage_imbalance: Stage 0 should be slowest (12 layers), stages 1-2 faster
validation_metrics.notes: Asymmetric stages test load balancing and pipeline bubble effects

experiments.name: Jetson AGX Orin Edge Device
experiments.description: Single Jetson AGX Orin - validates model on edge/mobile hardware

workload.note: Reduced text_seq_len for edge device constraints

validation_metrics.notes: Edge device has lower compute and memory bandwidth, much higher latency

experiments.name: H100 Large Batch Throughput Test
experiments.description: 8 H100 devices with PP+TP, large batch size - validates throughput scaling

validation_metrics.notes: Large batch size improves throughput utilization, tests memory bandwidth limits

latency_validation.description: Compare simulated latency against expected ranges

communication_validation.description: Validate AllReduce and P2P communication overhead
communication_validation.allreduce_overhead: Should scale with TP size and tensor dimensions
communication_validation.p2p_overhead: Should scale with activation size and bandwidth

memory_validation.per_device_memory: Should decrease with TP size, increase with batch size

scaling_validation.tp_scaling: More TP should reduce latency but increase communication
scaling_validation.pp_scaling: More PP stages should reduce per-stage memory but increase P2P overhead
scaling_validation.batch_scaling: Larger batches should improve throughput but increase latency

hardware_configs.H100: High-end datacenter GPU with NVLink4 interconnect
hardware_configs.A100: Previous generation datacenter GPU with NVLink3

notes.usage: These experiments can be used to cross-validate the VLA model's performance predictions against real hardware measurements
